title: Villager Flower House
description: Adds a Flower House to the meadow and sunflower plains biome
body:
**This mod adds a Villager Flower House to the world, featuring Farmer villagers inside the new house.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3130f6805534c766325e7aa9ea569d7ff9ea9a1.jpeg)

You’ll find many flower pots all around the house, showcasing all kinds of flowers.Inside, the house is nicely decorated with even more flower pots and cozy flower banners.


![flower garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03935e35e1ba29764b3f08f9fb5abdc46909b05e.jpeg)

The Villager Flower House can spawn in Meadow and Flower Plains biomes.
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5023f9ea91fa329fa928fbc65bdb44e65351129c.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
